0.name: Prof. Candice
0.text: I'm impressed you actually got it to move somewhat... But you could feel the force pushing back at you, no?

1.name: Prof. Candice
1.text: Anyway, that is all for today class. I hope you learned something.

2.name: Prof. Candice
2.text: As usual, we'll have our assessment next week. After that, I won't be having anymore discussions.

3.name: Prof. Candice
3.text: I'll give you the time next week to study for your final exams that comes the week after.

6.1.name: Colin
6.1.text: Hey Perry, wanna drop by the library for a bit?
